generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a friend post about strategic autonomy. Honestly, I used to be skeptical too, but after seeing how our allies keep cutting corners on defense spending, I'm starting to think we need to go it alone. Look at the latest NATO reports - half the members aren't meeting their commitments. Why should we rely on them when they won't even meet their own promises? #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
